purpose: Lift deployed micro-cap strategies from nominal Sharpe ~0.6-1.5 (cosmetic) to a defensible, deployable edge. Companion analysis: ROADMAP_ALPHA_UPLIFT_README.md

grounding.backtest_run: python run.py backtest (full, local cache, no network)
grounding.universe: 586 stocks (>=120 trading days), filtered from a CURRENT micro-cap snapshot

engine_facts_verified.slippage_flaw: flat 0.2%, NOT ADV/size-dependent -> understates micro-cap impact for concentrated books
engine_facts_verified.price_limit_filter: excludes limit-up names from BUY only (engine.py:326-330); no 一字板 sell-side unfillability
engine_facts_verified.turnover_is_proxy: turnover = volume/avg_vol_20d (量比), NOT free-float turnover rate (factors/legacy.py:187)
engine_facts_verified.survivorship: NO delisting / point-in-time universe handling found (grep 退市/delist/survivor = 0 hits)

deployability_verdict.question: Is a backtest Sharpe < 1.5 meaningful for live deployment here?
deployability_verdict.short_answer: No. The headline 1.47 is a 1-month artifact; realistic full-period Sharpe is 0.6-0.85, and after three real-world haircuts likely < 0.5. The binding constraint is drawdown (-45% to -65%), not Sharpe.

measured_results.name: ST困境反转
measured_results.note: robust_start: ONLY 1 MONTH ran -> Sharpe statistically void

measured_results.name: 壳资源深度价值
measured_results.note: highest return; full period; Calmar~1.09; shell-value alpha is policy-decaying

measured_results.name: 极小小市值轮动
measured_results.note: pure size bet; ran 2 months before warning; beta not alpha

three_haircuts_unmodeled_or_undermodeled: Survivorship bias: universe = today's survivors; delisted/退市/long-suspended micro-caps excluded -> upward-biased exactly where it hurts most (micro-cap tail).
Non-linear liquidity impact: flat 0.2% slippage; real micro-cap impact ~ (order/ADV)^0.5 can be 1-3% per side for concentrated positions; monthly rebalance of 20-30 names compounds drag.
Multiple-testing selection: 19 strategies run, best reported -> inflated; needs Deflated Sharpe (Bailey & Lopez de Prado) haircut by trial count.
deployability_verdict.binding_constraint: Max drawdown -45% to -65%; even the top performer (S5) has -51% MDD. A concentrated long-only micro-cap book that can halve is undeployable at size regardless of Sharpe.

deployment_bar.stability: consistent across start dates and bull/bear regimes (no 1-2 month survivors)
deployment_bar.capacity: position sizing respects ADV; report strategy capacity in 万元
deployment_bar.significance: Deflated Sharpe > 0 after accounting for number of trials

current_alpha_exposure: Deployed strategies bet almost entirely on SIZE + deep-VALUE(PB) + a little momentum/low-vol. These are the most crowded, most beta-like, most crash-prone micro-cap sources (cf. 2024-01 micro-cap crash). The behavioral, shareholder-structure, event-driven, and quality-screened-value alphas are untapped.

alpha_source_taxonomy.name: Short-term reversal / liquidity provision
alpha_source_taxonomy.status: underused (mom20d used as trend, not reversal)

alpha_source_taxonomy.name: Lottery-demand avoidance (MAX / idio-vol / skew)
alpha_source_taxonomy.economic_root: Retail gambling preference -> high-skew names overpriced
alpha_source_taxonomy.status: operators exist, not assembled into a SHORT/avoid factor

alpha_source_taxonomy.name: Shareholder concentration (户数减少/筹码集中)
alpha_source_taxonomy.data_needed: 股东户数 quarterly + 十大流通股东
alpha_source_taxonomy.status: shareholders_cache/ exists -> wire into a factor

alpha_source_taxonomy.name: Earnings preannouncement / PEAD (业绩预告/快报)
alpha_source_taxonomy.economic_root: Underreaction to fundamentals; sparse coverage -> slow diffusion

alpha_source_taxonomy.name: Event catalysts (摘帽/回购/增持/重组/股权激励)
Shell value / reverse-merger expectation
alpha_source_taxonomy.decay_regime_risk: HIGH - decaying post-注册制 + delisting reform raises tail risk
alpha_source_taxonomy.data_needed: policy-regime flag + mcap + 重组 events
alpha_source_taxonomy.status: implicitly captured by S5; must be regime-gated

alpha_source_taxonomy.name: Quality-within-value / accruals / fraud screen
alpha_source_taxonomy.economic_root: Avoid value traps among cheap names
alpha_source_taxonomy.data_needed: operating cashflow, goodwill, accruals, audit opinion (PARTIAL)
alpha_source_taxonomy.status: operating_cashflow_ttm added; need balance-sheet detail + 审计意见

alpha_source_taxonomy.name: Peer momentum / lead-lag / supply-chain
alpha_source_taxonomy.economic_root: Slow info diffusion across linked names

alpha_source_taxonomy.name: Size premium
alpha_source_taxonomy.microcap_fit: dominant but it is BETA not alpha

workstreams.name: Credibility & Realism (make the number real before chasing alpha)
workstreams.why_first: Without survivorship-free universe, ADV-based impact, and multiple-testing discipline, every downstream Sharpe is fiction. This is the cheapest, highest-truth-yield work.

tasks.title: Point-in-time survivorship-free universe
tasks.status: partial — opt-in pit_universe flag wired into canonical engine.py run() (commit 3046230, 10 offline tests); default off = byte-identical. Full survivorship correction still needs the data layer to include delisted names in the panel.
tasks.rationale: Current 586-name universe is today's survivors; delisted/long-suspended micro-caps silently dropped -> the most dangerous bias in micro-cap.
tasks.method: Acquire delisted-name list + listing/delisting dates; build as-of universe membership per rebalance date; re-run all strategies; report the Sharpe delta.
tasks.expected_impact: Likely -0.1 to -0.4 Sharpe and worse MDD; truth.

tasks.title: ADV / square-root market-impact cost model + capacity cap
tasks.status: deferred — canonical engine.py still uses flat 0.2% slippage; ADV impact needs per-stock ADV plumbing into the rebalance cost loop (higher-risk edit). data/adv_impact.py ready; backlog for next slice.
tasks.rationale: Flat 0.2% slippage is unrealistic for thin micro-caps.
tasks.method: impact_bps = k * sqrt(order_value / ADV_value); ADV from amount=close*volume; cap position at <= c% of 20d ADV; expose capacity_wan in result.
tasks.expected_impact: Realistic net returns; flags low-capacity strategies.

tasks.title: Deflated Sharpe + trial accounting
tasks.status: partial — rigorous PSR/DSR (skew/kurt-adjusted) + E[max] deflation + PBO via CSCV delivered in research_loop/overfitting.py (commit 1bd523f, 27 offline tests). Supersedes the crude haircut in deflated_sharpe.py (kept for back-compat). Remaining: wire into the factor-zoo evaluator to report empirical PBO/DSR across the 36 factors + N strategy variants.
tasks.rationale: 19 strategies -> selection bias inflates the winner.
tasks.method: Implement Deflated Sharpe Ratio (Bailey & Lopez de Prado); record n_trials; haircut reported Sharpe; add to validators.
tasks.expected_impact: Honest significance; kills false winners.

tasks.title: Start-date / regime robustness harness
tasks.rationale: S1/S3 ran 1-2 months; numbers swing with start date.
tasks.method: Run rolling-start backtests (e.g., every quarter start), report distribution of annual/Sharpe/MDD; flag strategies that only survive lucky starts.
tasks.expected_impact: Separates robust edges from start-luck.

workstreams.name: Data Acquisition (the augmentation layer that unlocks new alpha)
workstreams.why: Current data = OHLCV + quarterly financials + total shares. The highest-quality untapped micro-cap alphas (A3-A6, A8) are gated on data we do not yet have. See data_acquisition_catalog.

tasks.title: Real amount + free-float turnover
tasks.rationale: Liquidity factors (A1) and the impact model (UA2) need real 成交额/换手率, not 量比.
tasks.expected_impact: Enables reversal/liquidity factors + realistic costs.

tasks.title: Shareholder-structure panel (户数/十大流通股东)
tasks.rationale: A3 concentration alpha; shareholders_cache/ already exists -> finish coverage + derive 户数环比.
tasks.expected_impact: New decorrelated factor.

tasks.title: Dragon-tiger + fund-flow
tasks.rationale: A4 hot-money flow.
tasks.expected_impact: Short-horizon micro-cap signal.

tasks.title: Event tables (业绩预告/快报, 摘帽, 增持/回购, 重组, 解禁)
tasks.rationale: A5/A6 event-driven alpha + A7 regime gating.
tasks.expected_impact: Event factors; lockup-expiry de-risk.

tasks.title: Balance-sheet detail + audit opinion (商誉/货币资金/应收/审计意见)
tasks.rationale: A8 value-trap / fraud screen.
tasks.expected_impact: Filters value traps; lifts deep-value Sharpe.

tasks.title: Standardize + cross-sectional neutralization pipeline
tasks.rationale: Raw factors let SIZE dominate everything -> all strategies collapse onto the same crash-prone bet. Prerequisite for honest factor evaluation.
tasks.method: Per-date pipeline: winsorize -> z-score/rank -> residualize against size+industry (group_rank/scale operators exist) -> combine. Apply to ALL factors before ranking.
tasks.expected_impact: Decorrelates factors; reveals true non-size alpha.

tasks.title: Symbolic / genetic factor search (gplearn / alphagen-style)
tasks.rationale: 16 operators already exist; search their composition space for formulaic alphas (WorldQuant-style). CPU-feasible, interpretable, highest discovery ROI.
tasks.method: Define operator/terminal set from factors/operators.py; fitness = IC-IR (penalize turnover + complexity for decay-resistance, cf. AlphaAgent); evolve; validate survivors on walk-forward; orthogonalize vs existing.
tasks.expected_impact: Net-new formulaic factors with positive IC-IR.

tasks.title: Factor-zoo evaluation + selection harness
tasks.rationale: engine already computes ic_mean, ic_ir, ic_decay, quantile_spread, factor_decay_halflife -> wire into a batch evaluator.
tasks.method: Run candidate library through IC/IC-IR/decay/quantile-spread; keep stable + decorrelated (|corr|<0.6) factors; combine by IC-weight or max-IR.
tasks.expected_impact: Systematic, repeatable selection; avoids ad-hoc.
tasks.status_note: Delivered: factor_report.py wires FactorZooEvaluator over full FACTOR_REGISTRY -> IC table + corr matrix + decorrelated IC-weighted composite, persisted JSON/CSV (f15002e).

tasks.title: Event-study factors (SUE / CAR)
tasks.rationale: Turn event tables into standardized surprise factors.
tasks.method: From DS4/DS5: standardized earnings surprise (SUE), event CAR, days-since-event decay; cross-sectional rank.
tasks.expected_impact: A5/A6 alpha, low correlation to price factors.

tasks.title: Conditional / interaction factors
tasks.rationale: Micro-cap mispricing is conditional (regime, sentiment, liquidity).
tasks.method: factor x regime, factor x turnover(sentiment proxy), factor x liquidity bucket; template_sentiment_conditional/regime_momentum exist -> generalize.
tasks.expected_impact: Higher conditional IC; regime robustness.

tasks.title: LLM-assisted hypothesis -> formula (AlphaAgent pattern)
tasks.rationale: Economic-hypothesis-first generation resists overfitting; already in roadmap.json literature.
tasks.method: LLM proposes economic hypothesis -> translate to formulaic factor over operator set -> validate via UC3 harness; strict trial accounting (feeds UA3).
tasks.expected_impact: Idea throughput with overfit guardrails.

tasks.title: Literature-sourced decorrelated factor batch (F037-F042)
tasks.rationale: 36 因子后边际递减且过拟合风险高，故只补有文献出处、纯用现有 panel 列、与既有因子低相关(目标|corr|<0.4)的净新 family，最小化互相关。
tasks.method: 从近期文献(Harvey-Siddique 2000 协偏度; Lou-Polk-Skouras 2019 隔夜-日内拉锯; Chordia 等 2001 换手 CV; Parkinson 1980 区间方差占比; 路径依赖回撤持续期; Amihud 2002 非流动性变化)映射为 6 个 panel 安全因子，加法式追加 factor_library.py + FACTOR_REGISTRY，25 例单测(构造性单调 + 无前视 + 去相关)，零回归。
delivered: F037 系统性协偏度
F038 隔夜-日内拉锯
F039 换手率变异系数
F040 隔夜跳空方差占比(首用 high-low 区间)
F041 水下时间/回撤持续期
F042 非流动性变化 Δ-Amihud
F043 价格延迟 Price delay (Hou-Moskowitz 2005, RFS) — 信息扩散族，滚动嵌套 OLS
tasks.expected_impact: 净新去相关 alpha 候选，供 combiner(UC3/UD3) IC 加权合成；各因子与最近邻既有因子在真实截面数据上目标 |corr|<0.4。
backlog: (已完成 F043) 后续：接入 combiner 对 43 因子实测 IC/去相关合成；接入 overfitting.py 出 PBO/DSR 部署裁决。

tasks.title: 因子部署裁决框架：PBO/DSR 打通 43 因子
delivered: research_loop/factor_deployment.py：factor_long_short_returns / build_returns_matrix / evaluate_deployment(DeploymentVerdict) + CLI
端到端：因子库→combiner(IC/去相关/composite)→overfitting(PBO/DSR/PSR)→部署裁决
min_coverage 覆盖率过滤解决多因子 warmup 错位导致公共期数坍塌问题
test_factor_deployment.py 20 例；research_loop 包 79 例零回归
tasks.validation: 真实 A 股 100×500 日(fwd=5,T=72)：best 单因子 PSR(vs0)=0.998 但 DSR=0.44(E[max]=0.38>best0.36)、PBO=0.48 → 正确判定多重检验运气最优，裁决走 29 因子 composite(PSR=0.994)。

workstreams.name: Algorithm & Portfolio (turn signals into a deployable book)
workstreams.note: Several of these lift Sharpe/Calmar WITHOUT new alpha and directly attack the -50% MDD binding constraint.

tasks.title: Risk overlay: vol-targeting + regime de-gross + max-DD throttle
tasks.rationale: The binding constraint is drawdown. The 2024-01 micro-cap crash (-30% in weeks) is the existential risk.
tasks.method: Scale gross exposure to target portfolio vol; de-gross when breadth collapses or micro-cap index < MA (crash filter); cut gross on rolling-DD breach. Distinct from per-name stop_loss (already daily).
tasks.expected_impact: MDD from ~-50% toward <-30%; Calmar up materially.

tasks.title: Portfolio construction beyond top-N equal-weight
tasks.rationale: Equal-weight top-N ignores risk; concentration drives MDD.
tasks.method: IC-weighted or risk-parity or constrained MVO; single-name cap (e.g., <=8%) + industry cap; integrate ADV cap from UA2.
tasks.expected_impact: Higher IR at same alpha; lower concentration risk.

tasks.title: Ensemble of DEcorrelated alphas
tasks.rationale: Current 'ensemble' template blends correlated momentum factors -> Sharpe 0.15. Real diversification needs low-correlation sources.
tasks.method: Combine reversal(A1/A2) + concentration(A3) + event(A5) + quality-value(A8); IC-weight; require pairwise |corr|<0.6.
tasks.expected_impact: Portfolio IR > any single factor; smoother equity curve.
tasks.status_note: Delivered: factors/combiner.py combine_factors() — greedy decorrelation (|corr|<max_corr) + IC-sign-aligned + equal/ic/ic_ir weighting composite; make_composite_strategy_def() no-lookahead ranking_fn; 15 tests (f15002e).

tasks.title: Walk-forward + purged/embargoed CV, single-use test set
tasks.rationale: Prevent leakage; enforce honest OOS. walk_forward.py + walk_forward_validation_split exist -> enforce discipline.
tasks.method: Purged K-fold with embargo gap; freeze test period (2025-2026) for single final eval; log every test access.
tasks.expected_impact: Trustworthy OOS estimate.

tasks.title: Online/rolling factor-weight refit (SGD)
tasks.rationale: Micro-cap alpha decays 6-12m; static weights stale. Researched in ml_factor_mining_research.md.
tasks.method: SGDRegressor.partial_fit on rolling window; L2 reg; refit weights quarterly; combine with UC3 selection.
tasks.expected_impact: Adapts to decay; +0.1-0.3 Sharpe per prior research.

dependencies.WS-A before headline claims: UA1+UA2+UA3 gate any deployable Sharpe statement
dependencies.UC1 before UC2/UC3/UC5: neutralization is prerequisite for honest factor eval
dependencies.UD1 independent + P0: risk overlay can ship immediately, biggest MDD win

success_criteria.phase_P0_done: Survivorship-free + ADV-impact + deflated-Sharpe + risk overlay in place; re-run produces TRUSTWORTHY (likely lower) baseline with MDD < -35%.
success_criteria.phase_P1_done: >=2 NEW decorrelated factors (from A1/A2/A3/A5) with walk-forward IC-IR > 0.3; ensemble net-of-cost OOS Sharpe >= 1.0, Calmar >= 0.5.
success_criteria.deploy_ready: OOS (single-use 2025-2026) net Sharpe >= 1.0 (target 1.5), Calmar >= 0.5, deflated-Sharpe > 0, capacity reported, stable across rolling starts.

sequencing: P0 (week 1-2): UA1, UA2, UA3, UD1, UB1 (DS1), DS9 -> a credible, de-risked baseline
P1 (week 3-5): UC1, UC3, UB2/UB3/UB4 (DS3/DS2/DS4-5), UC2, UD2, UD4 -> new decorrelated factors + honest OOS
P1-P2 (week 6-7): UD3, UC4, UC5, UD5, UB5 -> ensemble + adaptivity
P3 (backlog): UC6, DS10 -> LLM idea throughput, intraday

progress_log.still_top_pending: WS-A credibility (UA1 PIT-universe, UA2 ADV-impact, UD1 risk-overlay) implemented in data/ but wired ONLY into p0_engine_v2.py, NOT canonical engine.py/run.py — remains the #1 gap to make the number real.

delivered: UA1 (partial): opt-in pit_universe / delist_manager flags added to canonical engine.py run() — per-rebalance removal of names delisted-as-of-date via data/delisted.py; default off = byte-identical to prior behavior (3046230)
progress_log.validation: test_engine_pit_universe.py 10/10 pass (offline, synthetic + temp delist CSV); regression: test_engine_extras(20)/test_engine_fast(5, real data)/test_ic_engine(3)/test_limits(2) all green. engine.py diff = +23 additive lines, default path unchanged.
progress_log.still_top_pending: UA2 ADV-impact cost model (flat 0.2% slippage still in canonical engine; needs per-stock ADV in cost loop) and UD1 risk-overlay remain unwired into canonical engine — next credibility slice.

delivered: UA3 (partial): rigorous multiple-testing / backtest-overfitting statistics in research_loop/overfitting.py — probabilistic_sharpe_ratio (skew/kurt-adjusted PSR), expected_maximum_sharpe (Bailey–LdP extreme-value E[max] deflation benchmark, N=1 guard), deflated_sharpe_ratio (true DSR = PSR vs E[max]), probability_of_backtest_overfitting (PBO via CSCV), overfitting_report (1bd523f). Supersedes the crude haircut in deflated_sharpe.py, which is retained unchanged for back-compat.
progress_log.validation: test_overfitting.py 27/27 pass (offline, deterministic synthetic). Analytical properties verified: PSR monotonicity + benchmark=0.5 + skew/kurt sign; E[max] grows with N, zero at N=1/var=0; DSR deflation logic; PBO ≈0 for a dominant strategy, mean ≈0.48 over 16 pure-noise draws, =1.0 for a constructed overfit, C(S,S/2) combinatorics, input validation, no RankWarning. New module only — structurally zero regression (no engine/data edits).
progress_log.still_top_pending: Wire overfitting.py into the factor-zoo evaluator (empirical PBO/DSR across the 36 factors + strategy variants) to produce an honest deploy/no-deploy verdict. UA2 ADV-impact + UD1 risk-overlay still unwired into canonical engine.
